alt: Construction crew silhouettes against a warm dusk sky, with steel scaffolding framing the worksite.
Close-up of a carpenter's weathered hands planing a piece of timber on a workbench, wood shavings curling away.
A completed modern commercial building exterior at dusk, clean lines of steel, glass, and concrete catching the last warm light.
Interior of a residential renovation — a newly finished hardwood staircase beside a freshly framed window catching afternoon light.
Detail of a refinished heritage timber beam meeting carefully repointed brick — hand-restored mouldings visible alongside.
A work-in-progress build with exposed wood framing, partial roof structure and a crane silhouette in the background.
A completed modern residence at golden hour, warm light catching the timber soffit and dark steel window frames.
A completed residential kitchen with warm walnut cabinetry, honed stone counters and aged brass fixtures, soft afternoon light from a single tall window.
Documentary-style portrait of a weathered foreman in work jacket and hard hat, on site.
An organised craftsman's tool wall above a heavy workbench — hammers, chisels and hand planes arranged in neat rows.
A close-up of a clean work truck parked at a worksite at first light, ladders and material racks loaded on the back.
A stack of fresh-cut dimensional lumber in a materials yard, end grain visible, soft morning light across the boards.
A spirit level and measuring tape laid across a freshly installed structural beam during a quality inspection.
Architectural blueprints unrolled on a drafting table beside drafting tools.
